use_cases: Creating immersive hero sections with scroll-triggered reveal animations
Building narrative-driven landing pages with pinned scroll sections
Designing product showcases with progressive content disclosure
Implementing cinematic storytelling experiences with GSAP timelines
Adding sophisticated scroll-based animations to marketing pages
ai_summary: A scroll-driven storytelling component using GSAP and ScrollTrigger that creates immersive hero reveals through pinned scroll sections, clipPath animations, and split-text effects. The component orchestrates complex timeline-based animations triggered by scroll position, making it ideal for creating cinematic landing pages and narrative-driven product showcases with progressive content disclosure.
